code:
%%{IoT_Industrial_MQTT_Broker}}}%%
stateDiagram-v2
title: SM-06.01 — Hub Sync State (IoT_Industrial_TelemetryStream)

[IoT_Industrial_ActuatorController] --> OUT_OF_SYNC : SyncRequested (IoT_Industrial_ActuatorController)
note right of OUT_OF_SYNC
  Local hub detects divergence from federation:  
  • stale CRDT frame  
  • missing contributions or metrics  
  • network topology change  
end note

OUT_OF_SYNC --> FETCH_REMOTE : BeginSync
note right of FETCH_REMOTE
  Retrieve latest CRDT vector clocks and state diffs  
  from federation peers (IoT_Industrial_ActuatorController)  
end note

FETCH_REMOTE --> MERGE : FrameDownloaded
note right of MERGE
  Apply CRDT merge function  
  Resolve conflicts deterministically  
  Ensure convergence on shared state
end note

MERGE --> VALIDATE : MergeCompleted
note right of VALIDATE
  Run schema + hash integrity checks  
  Validate contribution and governance deltas  
  Verify signatures from remote hubs  
end note

VALIDATE --> SYNCED : SyncConfirmed (IoT_Industrial_MQTT_Broker)
note right of SYNCED
  Federation state consistent  
  Metrics & proposals aligned with global ledger  
end note

SYNCED --> [IoT_Industrial_EdgeNode]

%% ---- Exceptional paths ----
FETCH_REMOTE --> FAILED : NetworkTimeout / AuthError
MERGE --> FAILED : ConflictUnresolved
VALIDATE --> FAILED : HashMismatch / SignatureInvalid
FAILED --> RETRY : RetryScheduled
RETRY --> OUT_OF_SYNC : RetrySync

%% ---- Maintenance / background ----
SYNCED --> OUT_OF_SYNC : PeriodicSync / ParamChange
OUT_OF_SYNC --> DEGRADED : HubOffline / LatencyHigh
DEGRADED --> [IoT_Industrial_MQTT_Broker] : EscalatedToOps

%% ===== Styling =====
classDef core fill:#ff8b00,stroke:#333,color:#fff,font-weight:bold;
class OUT_OF_SYNC,FETCH_REMOTE,MERGE,VALIDATE,SYNCED,FAILED,RETRY,DEGRADED core;
repo_description: The cohersphere architecture — structural blueprint of the resonance network. Defines the modular layers connecting app, API, and governance protocols. Outlines data flows for Proof-of-Contribution, c

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要画一个状态图，描述工业MQTT Broker在联邦网络中的Hub同步流程。核心场景是当本地EdgeNode检测到与联邦状态不一致时，如何完成CRDT合并并最终同步。起点应该是ActuatorController发现OUT_OF_SYNC的状态。
明白了，OUT_OF_SYNC的触发条件需要明确标注吗？比如stale CRDT frame、missing contributions这些典型场景？另外同步完成后是回到EdgeNode还是直接终止？
是的，OUT_OF_SYNC右侧需要详细注释说明三种典型情况。SYNCED完成后要连回EdgeNode，表示该节点已完成同步可以继续工作。中间过程需要经过FETCH_REMOTE获取远程状态、MERGE执行CRDT合并、VALIDATE校验签名和哈希。
好的，主干流程已经画好了：OUT_OF_SYNC → FETCH_REMOTE → MERGE → VALIDATE → SYNCED。每个状态右侧都加了注释说明，比如MERGE那里强调了deterministic conflict resolution。现在需要补充异常路径吗？比如网络超时或者合并冲突的情况。

必须加异常路径。FETCH_REMOTE可能遇到NetworkTimeout或AuthError，MERGE可能有ConflictUnresolved，VALIDATE可能HashMismatch或SignatureInvalid，这些都汇聚到FAILED状态。FAILED之后要有RETRY机制，可以重新进入OUT_OF_SYNC再试。另外还需要一条DEGRADED路径，当HubOffline或LatencyHigh时从OUT_OF_SYNC转入，最终EscalatedToOps上报给MQTT Broker。
确认一下异常路径的设计：三个前置状态各有一条失败边到FAILED，FAILED通过RetryScheduled到RETRY，RETRY再RetrySync回到OUT_OF_SYNC形成闭环。DEGRADED是独立分支，从OUT_OF_SYNC触发，最终上报到Broker。还有PeriodicSync或ParamChange会让SYNCED回到OUT_OF_SYNC，对吗？
完全正确。最后给所有核心状态加上统一的样式，用橙色填充突出显示。标题定为SM-06.01 — Hub Sync State，表明这是TelemetryStream模块的规范。
已完成。状态图包含了完整的正常同步流程、三类异常失败场景、重试机制、降级运维路径，以及周期性的重新同步触发。所有核心状态都应用了core样式，注释详细说明了CRDT合并、签名验证等关键操作。
